user.description: Set up an Anthem receiver connected over RS-232. Pick the serial port the receiver is wired to — local USB adapters and ESPHome serial proxy ports are listed automatically. The port is probed to detect the model, protocol generation, and baud rate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to open the serial port.
error.no_receiver: No Anthem receiver responded on this port. Check the cable (straight-wired DB-9) and that the receiver is powered.

abort.already_configured: This serial port is already configured.
